name: pokemon-investing
description: Pokémon Card ROI & Grading Decision Engine

scripts.verify:app: npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.verify:scripts: node --check scripts/sync-pricecharting-prices.mjs && node --check scripts/backfill-pokedata-card-grades.mjs && node --check scripts/backfill-card-catalog.mjs && node --check scripts/sync-trends.mjs && node --check scripts/build-sealed-expansion-catalog.mjs && node --check scripts/mirror-sealed-images.mjs && node --check scripts/mirror-pricecharting-product-images.mjs && node --check scripts/mirror-pricecharting-extra-images.mjs && node --check scripts/fetch-top-chase-cards.mjs && node --check scripts/validate_against_tcgplayer.mjs && python3 -m py_compile scripts/train_sealed_ml.py scripts/retrain_sealed_ml.py scripts/sync_sealed_catalog.py scripts/import_pricecharting_csv.py scripts/backfill_pricecharting_ids.py
scripts.verify: npm run verify:app && npm run verify:scripts
